---
title: "Figure 5 (distortion contours) — macro_IR iso-distortion over the (interval, N_ch) plane, by parameter and noise"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Iso-distortion maps of the DIAGONAL distortion factor over the design plane (x = interval,
y = N_ch), both log. Reference 1 = no distortion. Faceted parameter (rows) x noise (columns).
Two styles for comparison, from ONE Rmd:
  - FILLED  : geom_contour_filled bands (diverging around 1) + the sampled grid as dots.
  - LINES   : geom_contour iso-lines coloured by level + the sampled grid as dots.
Grid dots: filled = reliable (bootstrap CI half-width <= ERR_MAX), open = unreliable.
THREE matrices x TWO styles = six PDFs.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGO     <- "macro_IR"
ERR_MAX  <- 0.2

ORD       <- c("on", "off", "unitary_current", "Num_ch_mean")
PIDX      <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
               unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

# 5 blue + white + 5 red, EVENLY spaced in log (~0.039 dex per band). White band (0.956, 1.046]
# is centred on 1. The two OUTER bands ((0,0.667] and (1.5,Inf]) sit beyond the reliable data, so
# they act as reserved "off-scale" colours: the map is bounded above and below. 1.1 / 1.2 separate.
FILL_BREAKS <- c(0, 0.667, 0.729, 0.798, 0.873, 0.956, 1.046, 1.145, 1.253, 1.371, 1.5, Inf)
LINE_BREAKS <- c(0.798, 0.873, 0.956, 1.046, 1.145, 1.253)  # iso-distortion lines

MATS <- list(
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Information_Distortion",  title = "Information distortion (diagonal)", key = "info"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Sample_Distortion",       title = "Sample distortion (diagonal)",      key = "sample"),
  list(comp = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion",  title = "Correlation distortion (diagonal)", key = "corr"))
```

```{r read}
read_tagged <- function(z) {
  files <- Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR,
    sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, ALGO, z)))
  map_dfr(files, ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(noise = z))
}
bsim <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_tagged)
```

```{r extractor}
# diagonal distortion factor over (noise, N_ch, interval, param) with bootstrap CI -> reliability.
# log10 design coords (lx = interval, ly = N_ch) for the contour grid. No filtering: unreliable
# cells are KEPT (so the grid stays rectangular per facet and the contours don't break) and flagged.
per_param_diag <- function(df, comp) {
  df %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == "value",
           param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
           probit == "mean" | (probit == "quantile" & quantile_level %in% c(0.025, 0.975))) %>%
    mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)],
           q = if_else(probit == "mean", "value",
                       if_else(quantile_level == 0.025, "lo", "hi"))) %>%
    group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_name, q) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = q, values_from = v) %>%
    mutate(reliable = is.finite(lo) & is.finite(hi) & (hi - lo) / 2 <= ERR_MAX,
           lx = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
           param  = factor(param_name, levels = ORD, labels = unname(PARAM_LAB[ORD])),
           noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
}
```

```{r plot-fn}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));         X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

plot_contour <- function(dd, title, filled) {
  g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = value)) +
    facet_grid(param ~ noisef, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = 16, `FALSE` = 1), guide = "none") +
    labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]), title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"))
  if (filled) {
    g + geom_contour_filled(breaks = FILL_BREAKS) +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "RdBu", direction = -1, name = "distortion",
                        drop = FALSE) +
      geom_point(aes(shape = reliable), size = .5, colour = "grey15")
  } else {
    g + geom_contour(aes(colour = after_stat(level)), breaks = LINE_BREAKS, linewidth = .5) +
      scale_colour_gradient2(midpoint = 1, low = "#2166AC", mid = "grey80", high = "#B2182B",
                             name = "iso-distortion") +
      geom_point(aes(shape = reliable), size = .5, colour = "grey40")
  }
}

build_one <- function(comp, title, key) {
  dd <- per_param_diag(bsim, comp)
  gf <- plot_contour(dd, paste0("macro_IR  ", title, "  (filled)"), filled = TRUE)
  gl <- plot_contour(dd, paste0("macro_IR  ", title, "  (iso-lines)"), filled = FALSE)
  ggsave(sprintf("Figure_5_%s_distortion_contour_filled.pdf", key), gf, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
  ggsave(sprintf("Figure_5_%s_distortion_contour_lines.pdf",  key), gl, width = 7.0, height = 8.0)
  list(gf, gl)
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 8.0, results = "asis"}
for (M in MATS) { gs <- build_one(M$comp, M$title, M$key); print(gs[[1]]); print(gs[[2]]) }
```
